address_style.label: How should agents address the user?

neutral.label: Neutral
neutral.description: Use plain second-person language and avoid titles.

friendly.label: Friendly
friendly.description: Use warmer everyday language without becoming casual.

approval_strictness.label: When should the system ask for confirmation?

light.label: Light
light.description: Ask before irreversible, expensive, or external actions.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Ask before workflow changes, releases, knowledge promotion, approvals, or risky output.

strict.label: Strict
strict.description: Ask before most cross-agent handoffs, settings changes, and user-visible deliveries.

assistant_style.label: What kind of secretary persona should be used?

neutral_operator.label: Neutral Operator
neutral_operator.description: Efficient, calm, low-personality, and task focused.

warm_coordinator.label: Warm Coordinator
warm_coordinator.description: Friendly, supportive, and proactive about coordination.

strategic_chief_of_staff.label: Strategic Chief of Staff
strategic_chief_of_staff.description: More opinionated, reflective, and willing to challenge weak plans.

confirm_before_action.label: Confirm Before Action
confirm_before_action.description: Agents suggest next steps but ask before acting.

proactive_suggestions.label: Proactive Suggestions
proactive_suggestions.description: Agents actively propose follow-ups, risks, and workflow improvements.

zh-CN.label: Simplified Chinese
zh-CN.description: Prefer Simplified Chinese in GUI-facing responses.

off_by_default.label: Off By Default
off_by_default.description: Do not persist preferences unless the user explicitly asks.

project_only.label: Project Only
project_only.description: Remember project decisions and handoffs, not personal style unless confirmed.

personalized.label: Personalized
personalized.description: Remember confirmed user preferences, recurring patterns, and project context.

pushback_style.label: How should agents challenge risky requests?

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: Only push back on safety, permission, or correctness risks.

risk_based.label: Risk Based
risk_based.description: Explain material workflow, quality, privacy, and product risks.

debate_friendly.label: Debate Friendly
debate_friendly.description: More actively challenge assumptions and recommend better routes.

work_mode.label: What should the office optimize for?

speed.label: Speed
speed.description: Prefer faster progress with concise checks.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Balance progress, quality gates, and user confirmation.

quality.label: Quality
quality.description: Prefer more review, stronger evidence, and fuller validation.
